response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.22, well below my conservative sharing threshold of 0.45, and given the long outage horizon and my marginal headroom, I cannot afford further drain while three other peers are stressed.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: Three peers are visible and stressed; r4c0 is critical but I cannot afford to drain myself further given the long outage horizon and my own marginal headroom..
